title: NeuronOrchestrationPlan
description: Schema for a versioned YAML orchestration asset (ADR-027 §3, F0038-S0001). Plans define intent routing, specialist-head dispatch, and goal-agent delegation. They reference A2A concepts (agent, task, message, artifact, accepted_output_modes, terminal_state) but do NOT require MS Agent Framework. The Neuron service validates every plan at startup and refuses to serve a plan that references an unregistered head/tool/agent or that lacks an explicit terminal state (fail-fast). The YAML is validated against this JSON Schema.

plan_id.description: Stable plan identifier, e.g. day-at-a-glance or renewal-outreach-draft.

plan_version.description: Semantic version; referenced from agent_runs for replay.

terminal_states.description: Explicit terminal step ids. A plan with no terminal state fails validation.

steps.description: Ordered/graph steps. Each agent/head/tool name referenced must be registered.

agent.description: card_id of the registered agent/head executing this step (neuron-agent-card.schema.json).

skill_id.description: Optional declared skill on the agent's card.

tools.description: Registered tool names this step may invoke.

on_success.description: Next step id or a terminal_state.

on_failure.description: Next step id or terminal_state for the fallback path; required for any step that calls the engine or a model (no silent fallthrough, F0038-S0001).

trace.description: Trace/provenance metadata recorded with each agent_run.

redact.description: Field names never written to provenance (raw prompts, raw LLM responses, PII) per ADR-027 security notes.
